title: Cave Stuff
description: This mod makes caves better by adding blocks, mobs and biomes.
body:
![Cave Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1549ba5a00959cd9a584eee0fe7b82e4a1318a9.png)

Decoration and food update is out now!
 

**This mods adds a ton of stuff, currently adding:**

 2 new cave biomes: The guano caves and the glowworm caves.

37 new unique mobs to find in caves

 And so much more...

 

**_This mods requires GeckoLib._** This mod is aviable in spanish and english. This mod is made in MCreator so expect some bugs.

**Credits:**
 WhackyAxis (creator), MCreator, ElHuertoGC (Some Ideas) beam338899 (purple springtail idea) Sadslugcat (Zombie Angler idea). JudgementBird (Life blossom and Life blossom Harpoon Idea) DezzTheSlayer(Smercallberg)(for a lot of tiny ideas and Golden Ranas) Egg(Deepstaria Jelly)
Special Thanks to Smercallberg for making a showcase of the mod
